template.p: Welcome to the Odoo Law Firm package!

This module provides a comprehensive suite of tools designed specifically for law firms, enabling efficient management of time, appointments, deadlines, cases, and client relationships. Lawyers represent their clients and protect their interests during legal proceedings.

By using this module, you’ll gain access to essential features such as case management, invoicing, and time tracking. These tools streamline the workflow from initial consultations to billing, allowing law firms to focus on delivering high-quality legal services.
You can access every installed App in your Odoo database on your main dashboard.

ul.li: The Calendar App manages your schedule and appointments.
Manage client assessment with CRM App and handle quotations and contracts with Sales App.
Centralize case files and tasks with the Case & Documents App.
The Timesheet App tracks billable hours and time spent.

li.p: The Approvals App manages emails that need approval or review before being sent to clients.

ul.li: Use the Sign App to securely sign engagement letters and legal documents, ensuring clear agreements before or after legal work.
Ease your invoicing process with the Invoice App.

Showcase your services and client testimonials seamlessly on your professional website using the
Website App .

font.span: Manage your firm’s internal expenses tracking with the
to keep spending transparent and under control.

ul.li: Streamline legal research and collaboration with the Knowledge App by centralizing case law, legal texts, and internal guides for efficient retrieval, collaboration, and compliance.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Odoo is entirely integrated into an App. Download it to turn your phone to manage your entire business in it.

template.p: By uploading this module's demo data, your database has been filled with a few contacts.
You should be able to execute the following flows to have an overview of various flows you can quickly execute with this package using Odoo.
Of course, this is just an overview of the features included in this package. Feel free to add new apps, delete/modify demo data, and test everything around!

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-warning pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You didn't import demo data? You can still do it. Go to Apps > Industries > Upgrade your Law Firm package and check the related box.

h3.strong: Manage your agenda with the calendar app

template.p: Stay organized by keeping track of all appointments, deadlines, and internal tasks using the Calendar app. Legal assistants can easily assign meetings by accessing the calendars of individual lawyers.

li.p: Open the Calendar app.
Schedule your meetings, deadlines, or court appearances by clicking on an empty time slot.
Check other lawyers’ availability by selecting their calendars to coordinate meetings.

template.p: Synchronizing external calendars: If lawyers or secretaries use tools like Google Calendar or Outlook, follow these steps to sync them with Odoo:

li.p: Navigate to Settings > Calendar > Sync External Calendar.
Link each user’s external calendar to the Odoo Calendar app.

template.p: This ensures that appointments made outside of Odoo automatically appear in the Odoo calendar.
Refer to the following guides for detailed steps:

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: With the Appointment app, you can easily schedule client meetings by sharing a booking link. Clients can select a time directly from your calendar that works for both of you, saving time and avoiding back-and-forth communication.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: Use the Website App to enhance your law firm’s online visibility and make it easy for clients to contact you.

template.p: Easily create and manage a new case for your client using Odoo’s streamlined workflow.

p.strong: Steps to create a new case:

ol.li: Use the CRM app to manage client interactions and conduct the required Know Your Customer (KYC) assessment before accepting a case.
Create a Sale Order from scratch or use the Standard Lawyer Service Quotation template.

Adapt your Terms & Conditions directly on the quotation, and the customers will be able to sign it through their Odoo portal, or create or use the template of the Engagement Letter in the Sign App, and request the client's signature for the agreement.
Confirm the Sale Order, which will automatically generate the related Case and Tasks.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: Link Knowledge articles or notes with practical info (e.g., KYC assessment).

li.p: Save key info like KYC details, risk level, or client background in the Knowledge App’s clipboard.
Attach it directly to the related contact or opportunity in the CRM.
Quickly access all essential data when reviewing a case or preparing a proposal.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true

ul.li: By creating an invoice for the quotation, you can record the down payment based on a percentage of the total or a fixed amount (e.g., €1000, upfront for the Legal Services).
Final payment: Once the case is closed, invoice the client for the remaining balance based on the time tracked in the timesheets.

h3.strong: Organize case files in Cases and documents

template.p: Centralize all case activities and documents using the Cases and Documents apps.

ol.li: Open the related Cases.
Assign responsible users.
Manage tasks by organizing them into stages such as 'To Do,' 'In Progress,' and 'Done' to keep track of progress.
Log your time directly in the 'Timesheet' tab of a specific task, or use the timer to track the time spent on that task.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Organize tasks by Milestones and assign specific dates to key stages in the case.

li.em: Tasks: Prepare Legal Arguments, Review Submissions and Arguments from Opposing Counsel

ol.li: Open the Timesheet app.
Use the timer functionality to track time spent on a specific client case.
Manually add a new line to register time on specific tasks if needed.
Alternatively, you can access the Timesheet app via the smart button on the case page to view an overview of timesheets related to that case, with the same option available for a specific task.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You can set up a Billing Time Target per month per employee to keep track of billable hours and ensure targets are met.

ol.li: Access documents via the smart button on the case page; each case automatically generates a dedicated folder for organizing case-related documents.
Add documents directly to case folder within the Documents app, or on the tasks or cases themselves.
Use the Documents icon 📄 to add attachments from tasks, sales orders, or invoices directly to the correct client case folder in the Documents app. (see screenshot below)

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: How to build your court bundle:

ul.li: Mark your essential documents as favorites.
Merge them into a single document, ready to be submitted to the judge.

li.p: Create your approval groups

ol.li: Open the Approvals app → Configuration → Approval Groups.
Click Create, give the group a name, and add the people who will approve emails.

li.p: Choose who they can approve for

In Implied Groups, add the user groups whose emails they are allowed to approve.
Example: If managers are the approvers and you add “Lawyers” and “Assistants” as implied groups, managers can approve emails from all lawyers and assistants.
Decide if approval is required or only optional: You can set this for each approval group, or change it for all groups in the general settings of the Approvals app.
Submit an email for approval:
When you write an email, click Submit for Approval.
Select who should approve it.
The approver will receive your email inside their Approvals app.
Approvers review the email
They open the email in the Approvals app.
They can read it, ask questions or give feedback in the chatter, and change fields like From or To if needed.
Approve and send the email
When everything looks good, the approver clicks Approve, then Send.
With Approve and Send, they can even handle several emails at the same time from the list view — fast and easy.

template.p: Ensure every billable hour and expense is accurately accounted for and invoiced.

ol.li: Confirm the quotation to generate an invoice automatically.
Send the invoice directly to the client from Odoo.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Use the Sign App to request a signature from the partner to approve the completed legal documents before delivery and invoicing the client.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3
div.p: Use the Expenses App to keep track of all firm-related costs in one place, such as a restaurant with a client or office supplies. This ensures internal expenses remain transparent and easy to manage.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none o-contenteditable-false lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3
o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true w-100 px-3

li.p: Select the Standard Lawyer Service Quotation Template
Automatically adds a quote calculator with a Disbursements calculator.
Includes all products from the “Disbursements” category. Any new product added to this category will appear automatically.
Update fees after a Case
Enter the quantities for each disbursement type (e.g., administrative, kilometers).
The spreadsheet calculates the total automatically.
Save updated amount
Click “Save in S000X” at the top middle of the page (X = your Sales Order number).
The total amount updates as the price of the Disbursements product on the Sales Order.
Confirm quotation and generate invoice
Validate the quotation once all fees are entered and totals are correct.
Odoo generates the invoice automatically.
Set up the group of claimants
Create a contact and set it as a Group.
Add the individual contacts inside this group.
For each person, enter their percentage share of the service (their participation).
Split the invoice based on the group
When you create an invoice for this Group, a Split Invoice button will appear.
Click Split Invoice and Odoo will automatically create separate invoices for each person in the group, using the percentage you defined for them.
The original invoice is cancelled
After the split, the initial global invoice is cancelled and replaced by the individual invoices for each claimant.

ol.li: Schedule the first consultation: Add a consultation with John Doe to your calendar.
Open the case: Create a new case for the case.
Organize tasks: Set up tasks for the case, such as "Document Drafting" and "Legal Research."
Manage documents: Upload and organize case documents in the case’s document folder.
Log your time: Track hours spent on each task in the Timesheet tab.
Invoice the client: Compile logged hours, document preparation costs, and travel expenses into the invoice.

div.class: o_editor_banner user-select-none lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-success pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 px-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: You completed that demo use case! There are millions of other ways to adapt your Odoo setup to fit your business needs.
Discover more about Odoo by diving into our documentation and academy, and feel free to request a demo if you need help!

span.strong: Do you want to go further?

ul.li: Make and receive calls, and send SMS or WhatsApp messages directly through Odoo by adding our Phone and WhatsApp module.
Manage your team's and integrate them in all processes by adding the Employees App.

div.class: o_editor_banner lh-1 d-flex align-items-center alert alert-info pb-0 pt-3 o-contenteditable-false
w-100 ms-3 o_editor_banner_content o-contenteditable-true
div.p: Would you like to discuss your Odoo setup with us or go even further?
